BEAST MODE

INITIALIZING TACTICAL SYSTEMS...
⚔️ BEAST MODE
INITIALIZE YOUR OPERATOR PROFILE
Identify Yourself, Warrior.
Before deployment, I need your intel. This shapes your entire experience — training plans, XP multipliers, and AI responses.
Body Metrics.
Ye data tera BMI, calorie targets, aur workout recommendations calculate karne ke liye use hoga.
Your Body Type?
Apna natural body type select karo. Ye tera nutrition aur training style optimize karega.
🦴
Ectomorph — Lean / Thin
Patla lean structure · Narrow shoulders · Fast metabolism · Weight gain mushkil
💪
Mesomorph — Athletic / Balanced
Naturally muscular · Broad shoulders · Easily gains muscle · Moderate metabolism
🏋️
Endomorph — Soft / Fat-prone
Body fat easily store · Round shape · Slow metabolism · Weight lose karna difficult
🎯 Launch Your Campaign.
Ek fitness/life campaign set karo. Ye tera North Star hoga — har decision isi ke liye.
Your Roles? (Multi-select)
Ek ya zyada roles select karo. Combination bhi allowed hai — jaise Student + Athlete. Custom role bhi type kar sakte ho.
📚 Student
💪 Athlete
💻 Developer
🎨 Creator
🚀 Entrepreneur
🎭 Artist
🎮 Gamer
🔬 Researcher
✏️ Custom +

⚔️
Kamalesh Kumar Thakur
Lead Developer & UI/UX Architect
🎓 Class 12 · BSEB💻 Frontend Dev🚀 Aspiring SWE📸 Photographer🎬 Filmmaker
THE PROBLEM
"Ek student ke liye distraction se ladna sabse badi chunauti hai. Generic apps bohot hain, lekin unme wo 'Warrior Mindset' nahi tha."
THE MISSION
"Maine BEAST MODE isliye banaya taaki main aur mere jaise anya students apne focus ko ek weapon ki tarah use kar sakein. Ye sirf ek app nahi, ek digital discipline environment hai."
CORE STACK
⚡ HTML5🎨 CSS3🧠 JavaScript ES6+🐍 Python📊 Chart.js📸 Photography🎬 Filmmaking
PHILOSOPHY
"Code like an engineer, think like a warrior."
— Iron Man / J.A.R.V.I.S inspired
INSPIRATION & GOALS
🤖
J.A.R.V.I.S Inspired — The relentless intelligent AI. BEAST MODE channels that energy into a student's daily life.
👊
Brother's Discipline — Real motivation comes from watching someone operate at their peak.
🚀
2026 Goal: Build an ecosystem jo education aur productivity ko game ki tarah exciting bana de.
⚔️
BEAST MODE v5.0
Built with 🔥 by Kamalesh Kumar Thakur
Class 12 · Bihar, India · Single HTML File

OPERATOR PROFILE
🔔 NOTIFICATIONS
Ye app smart notifications bhejta hai:
✅ Study session complete · ⚠️ Target miss hone par · 🔥 Habit reminder · 🚨 Streak danger · ⭐ XP milestones
💡 Android app mein automatically work karta hai. Browser mein Allow karo permission dialog mein.
